scripts.prepublish:npm: tsup && rm -f npm/*.mjs npm/mcp/*.mjs && cp dist/*.mjs npm/ && mkdir -p npm/mcp && cp dist/mcp/*.mjs npm/mcp/
scripts.publish:npm: npm run prepublish:npm && cd npm && npm publish --tag beta --access public
scripts.publish:npm:stable: npm run prepublish:npm && cd npm && npm publish --access public
